title: The Pale Garden
description: Adds the creaking and the pale garden to minecraft before the update.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1a258b9c00aea9de5a0a3a7ec58bed2d7af27f7.png)

(https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe9a94f11d60894ad644435be5f07c3551dc0d42_0.webp)

This mod adds the creaking to minecraft before mojang, it has almost every feature from minecraft live!
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/16cf0fa8f16ebaca08551f39fa7c3ca2059e7b67.png) The **model is almost a 1:1 recreation!**

**He has the weeping angel sorta of style, custom sounds i made, and more!**

**He usually spawns in the night, in the biome Pale Garden.**

 

**I Hope you enjoy the experience!**
